ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in_progress, completed, archived, cancelled) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* List of keywords or tags associated with the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction */,
  "stoichiometry" TEXT /* Stoichiometry of the reaction (including direction) */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway the reaction belongs to */,
  "reaction_type" TEXT /* Type of reaction (e.g., irreversible, reversible, transport) */,
  "substrates" TEXT /* List of substrates involved in the reaction */,
  "products" TEXT /* List of products formed in the reaction */,
  "gene_association" TEXT /* List of genes associated with the reaction */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the enzyme catalyzing the reaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reactions_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pathway */,
  "pathway_type" TEXT /* Type of pathway (e.g., metabolic, signaling) */,
  "super_pathway" TEXT /* Super-pathway that this pathway belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flux_values" (
  "flux_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flux value */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reaction */,
  "flux_value" REAL /* Value of the flux */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the flux value */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the flux value */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the flux value */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the flux value */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the flux value (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flux value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flux_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flux_values_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flux_values_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of the condition (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the condition value */,
  "condition_category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., environmental, genetic) */,
  "condition_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or group the user belongs to */,
  "lab" TEXT /* Laboratory or group the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the experiment (e.g., web, API) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the experiment was accessed (e.g., IP address, geolocation) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
